emails.subject: Your MaxWell assessment results — Dr. Haase noticed a few patterns, [FIRST_NAME]
emails.preview: What the data is pointing to
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME] — quick note from Dr. Haase at MaxWell Clinic.

I reviewed your Custom Health Assessment, and a few patterns stood out immediately:

* Primary focus: [CORE_ISSUE_1]
* Secondary contributors: [CORE_ISSUE_2], [CORE_ISSUE_3]
* Common symptoms in this pattern: [SYMPTOM_A], [SYMPTOM_B], [SYMPTOM_C]

Here is what progressive functional medicine has taught me: the body is a complex adaptive system. When it is struggling, it is almost never one thing — it is a cascade. And the most important move is to find the earliest point in that cascade where an intervention actually changes the downstream pattern.

The 3 things that create the most durable improvement for people with [CORE_ISSUE_1]:

1. Map the cascade — not just the final symptom
2. Intervene at the root, with precision — not at the level where symptoms appear
3. Restore the system's ability to self-regulate — the goal is not lifelong dependency on treatment

We practice advanced functional and integrative medicine in Nashville and Brentwood, TN.

Your next step:
* Option A: See your recommended first steps inside the app → [VIEW_MY_PLAN_LINK]
* Option B: Book a new patient consultation — let us build your personalized MaxWell Blueprint → [SCHEDULE_LINK]

— Dr. David Haase, MD
MaxWell Clinic | Nashville & Brentwood, TN | maxwellclinic.com

emails.subject: The cascade behind [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] — and where to intervene
emails.preview: A useful framework for understanding your pattern
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

I want to share a framework that I find genuinely changes how patients think about chronic symptoms.

The body does not just malfunction in isolation. What appears as [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] is almost always the downstream result of a cascade — a series of connected disruptions that began upstream, often years before the symptom became the main complaint.

Common cascade patterns for your type of presentation include: a sustained cortisol disruption that progressively impairs sleep quality, which over time reduces cellular repair, which affects energy production, which shows up as fatigue and cognitive difficulty. Each step reinforces the next. Standard care often steps in at the bottom of the cascade — at the level of the final symptom — without addressing the upstream driver.

At MaxWell Clinic, we begin by mapping the full cascade. Advanced functional testing, a detailed history, and a framework that looks at how your specific systems are interacting. Then we identify the highest-leverage intervention point — the place where a precise action creates the most downstream improvement.

That is progressive functional medicine. That is what we do.

— Dr. David Haase, MD
MaxWell Clinic | Nashville & Brentwood, TN | maxwellclinic.com

[Book Your MaxWell Consultation →]([SCHEDULE_LINK])

emails.subject: A patient who came in with your pattern — what shifted at MaxWell
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

One last note — a patient story that often resonates with people who complete assessments like yours.

A man in his late 50s came to MaxWell Clinic after years of progressive cognitive slowing, significant fatigue, and what he described as a steady loss of the vitality he had assumed was 'just aging.' He had been cleared by multiple conventional specialists.

After a comprehensive MaxWell intake — advanced neurocognitive markers, full metabolic panel, mitochondrial function testing, and a detailed history — we identified three specific, addressable root drivers that had been progressing undetected.

We built a personalized MaxWell Blueprint around those findings. A targeted protocol, adjusted over four months as we tracked his response.

He described the improvement as 'the most significant shift in my health in a decade.' His energy and mental clarity had returned to a level he thought was behind him.

Individual results vary. Outcomes depend on many personal and health factors and are never guaranteed. But the principle holds across our patient population: map the cascade, intervene at the root, restore the system's capacity to heal.

Your assessment is the starting point. Let us put it to work.

— Dr. David Haase, MD
MaxWell Clinic | Nashville & Brentwood, TN | maxwellclinic.com

Disclaimer: Individual results vary. This is not medical advice.

[Schedule Your MaxWell Consultation →]([SCHEDULE_LINK])

gamma_content.digital_health_report:
🔎 DIGITAL SEO HEALTH REPORT — maxwellclinic.com
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 DOMAIN SNAPSHOT
──────────────────
| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Global Rank | #99,829 |
| Keywords Ranked | 7,293 |
| Monthly Traffic | ~19,025 visits |
| Traffic Value | $3,505/mo |
| Keywords in Top 10 | 15 |
| SERP Features Traffic | ~0 visits/mo |

---

🔑 THE CORE FINDING: RANKING WITHOUT EARNING CLICKS
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
MaxWell Clinic ranks for 7,293 keywords but converts almost none of that visibility into actual traffic capture.

- Pos #1: 2 keywords
- Pos #2–3: 2 keywords
- Pos #4–10: 11 keywords
- Pos #11–20: 35 keywords
- SERP Features Traffic: ~0 visits/mo

The vast majority of ranked terms sit in positions 11–20 — the second page — where click-through rates approach zero, leaving thousands of monthly searches uncontested.

---

🤖 AI SEARCH GAP
──────────────────
MaxWell Clinic appears in **41 AI Overview SERPs** but is cited in **0** of them. The practice is visible enough for Google's AI to recognize the topic space, yet not once does it earn the citation. As AI Overviews increasingly absorb clicks before a user ever reaches page one, being present but uncited is functionally the same as being absent. This is an urgent structural gap.

---

🎯 BIGGEST OPPORTUNITY: LEAKY GUT CLUSTER
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
- [pos 9] how to heal leaky gut — 3,600/mo | KD:28
- [pos 10] how to cure leaky gut — 1,600/mo | KD:39
- [pos 9] heal leaky gut in 2 weeks — 1,600/mo | KD:13
- [pos 13] how to treat leaky gut — 1,300/mo | KD:48
- [pos 16] leaky gut treatment — 1,900/mo | KD:48
- [pos 18] leaky gut curable — 1,600/mo | KD:47
- [pos 16] how to fix leaky gut — 2,900/mo | KD:50

Combined search volume exceeds 14,000/mo across seven closely related terms, several already sitting on page one — consolidating these into one authoritative content hub is the single fastest path to a meaningful traffic jump.

---

⚡ WITHIN STRIKING DISTANCE (pos 4–10)
──────────────────────────────────────
- [pos 9] how to heal leaky gut — 3,600/mo | KD:28
- [pos 9] heal leaky gut in 2 weeks — 1,600/mo | KD:13
- [pos 10] how to cure leaky gut — 1,600/mo | KD:39
- [pos 9] how to repair leaky gut — 1,300/mo | KD:57
- [pos 9] curing leaky gut — 880/mo | KD:41
- [pos 8] maxwell doctor — 880/mo | KD:20

→ **Highest priority:** 'how to heal leaky gut' (pos 9, 3,600/mo, KD:28) — low difficulty and already near the top-5 threshold where clicks increase sharply.

---

🏆 VS YOUR TOP COMPETITOR
──────────────────────────
| Metric | MaxWell Clinic | mitchellholistichealth.com |
|---|---|---|
| Keywords Ranked | 7,293 | 3,696 |
| Monthly Traffic | ~19,025 | 11,757 |
| Traffic Value | $3,505/mo | $4,911/mo |

MaxWell Clinic ranks nearly **2× more keywords** and drives **62% more traffic** — yet Mitchell Holistic Health generates **40% more traffic value**, meaning their keywords convert at a higher commercial rate. More volume is not enough; keyword quality and intent alignment need attention.

---

🎯 3-PRIORITY ATTACK PLAN
──────────────────────────

**1. LEAKY GUT CONTENT CONSOLIDATION**
Merge and strengthen the 7 leaky gut articles into one definitive, clinically authoritative guide targeting the 14,000+/mo cluster.
*Target: move 3+ terms from pos 9–18 into pos 1–5 within 60 days.*

**2. AI OVERVIEW CITATION STRATEGY**
Reformat top-performing pages with direct question-and-answer structure and cited clinical sources to earn placement in the 41 AI Overview SERPs currently citing MaxWell zero times.
*Target: 5+ citations within 90 days.*

**3. PAGE-TWO RESCUE**
35 keywords sit in pos 11–20 — one content refresh cycle away from page one.
*Target: push 10 of the 35 into pos 1–10 within 90 days, prioritizing those with KD under 40.*

app_config.tagline: Progressive Functional and Integrative Medicine, Personalized for Every Stage of Health
symptoms: Unexplained weight gain or difficulty losing weight
Joint or muscle pain without clear cause
Sensitivity to foods or environmental triggers
Cold hands and feet or temperature sensitivity
Skin rashes, eczema, or chronic inflammation

careModels.name: MaxWell Care — 3-Month Program
careModels.desc: Clinician visits, unlimited MaxWell Advocate access, nutritionist support, advanced diagnostics, personalized treatment plan, unlimited messaging, and supplement discounts. Ideal for those beginning their root-cause health journey.

careModels.name: MaxWell Care — 12-Month Program
careModels.desc: Everything in the 3-month program with extended access for deeper transformation. Best for complex chronic conditions or those committed to long-term optimization.

careModels.name: Deep Dive Program
careModels.desc: An intensive diagnostic and consultation experience for patients who need comprehensive evaluation of complex or long-standing health challenges before committing to a longer program.

careModels.name: Plasma Exchange
careModels.desc: Therapeutic plasma exchange for patients with autoimmune conditions, cognitive concerns, or chronic inflammatory disease. Supervised by experienced clinical staff.

careModels.name: Ketamine Infusion Therapy
careModels.desc: Medically supervised ketamine infusions for treatment-resistant depression, anxiety, PTSD, and chronic pain. Conducted in a safe, supportive clinical environment.

careModels.name: IV Therapies and NAD+
careModels.desc: Customized intravenous nutrient therapies including NAD+, high-dose vitamin C, and targeted mineral infusions to support energy, immunity, and cellular repair.
